problem id: 8f07a84d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00011101 -> 00111010
  00010100 -> 00101000
  11011111 -> 00111111
  11000111 -> 00001111
  10110010 -> 01100101
  10010000 -> 00100001
  10000100 -> 00001001
  00001011 -> 00010110
  11010111 -> 00101111
  01000101 -> 10001010

query: 01110100
predicted answer: 11101000
